TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_byacing_(riyax), title = byacing_(riyax), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/byacing_(riyax)} }

S.FORM: Byacing (riyax) hya' ga lpgan na riyax qaniy hya. lpgan na 'tayal sraral hya' ga, magal squ psbahan aring hmbku' byacing ruw mtbalay byacing ruw mucing sa mpuzyut lawziy qu sinxalan lmpuw na 'tayal.
Byacing (riyax) hya' ga lpgan na riyax qaniy hya. lpgan na 'tayal sraral hya' ga, magal squ psbahan aring hmbku' byacing ruw mtbalay byacing ruw mucing sa mpuzyut lawziy qu sinxalan lmpuw na 'tayal.
S.PHON: βjaʦ~ʨiŋ (rijax) ħjaʔ ɣa lpɣan na rijax qanij ħja. lpɣan na ʔtajal s~ɕraral ħjaʔ ɣa, maɣal s~ɕqu ps~ɕβaħan ariŋ ħmβkuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ruw mtβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ruw muʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕa mpuzjut lawzij qu s~ɕinxalan lmpuw na ʔtajal.
